fields.name: B0OIE
fields.description: Buffer 0 overflow interrupt enable This bit enables the buffer 0 overflow interrupt.

fields.name: B1OIE
fields.description: Buffer 1 overflow interrupt enable This bit enables the buffer 1 overflow interrupt.

fields.name: B2OIE
fields.description: Buffer 2 overflow interrupt enable This bit enables the buffer 2 overflow interrupt.

fields.name: B3OIE
fields.description: Buffer 3 overflow interrupt enable This bit enables the buffer 3 overflow interrupt.

fields.name: AMEIE
fields.description: AHB master error interrupt enable This bit enables the AHB master error interrupt.

fields.name: BM192
fields.description: 192 Block mode This bit defines the number of blocks per line

fields.name: CE
fields.description: Cache enable This bit enables the cache unit.

fields.name: CL
fields.description: Cache lock This bit lock the cache onto the buffer defined in the CLB field.

fields.name: CLB
fields.description: Cache lock buffer This field select the buffer on which the cache is locked.

fields.name: FC
fields.description: Force caching This bit force the caching into the cache regardless of the MPU attributes. The cache must be enable (CE bit set).

fields.name: PD
fields.description: Prefetch disable This bit disables the prefetch of the cache.

fields.name: OC
fields.description: Outter cachability This bit configure the cachability of an access generated by the GFXMMU cache.

fields.name: OB
fields.description: Outter bufferability This bit configure the bufferability of an access generated by the GFXMMU cache.

fields.name: B0OF
fields.description: Buffer 0 overflow flag This bit is set when an overflow occurs during the offset calculation of the buffer 0. It is cleared by writing 1 to CB0OF.

fields.name: B1OF
fields.description: Buffer 1 overflow flag This bit is set when an overflow occurs during the offset calculation of the buffer 1. It is cleared by writing 1 to CB1OF.

fields.name: B2OF
fields.description: Buffer 2 overflow flag This bit is set when an overflow occurs during the offset calculation of the buffer 2. It is cleared by writing 1 to CB2OF.

fields.name: B3OF
fields.description: Buffer 3 overflow flag This bit is set when an overflow occurs during the offset calculation of the buffer 3. It is cleared by writing 1 to CB3OF.

fields.name: AMEF
fields.description: AHB master error flag This bit is set when an AHB error happens during a transaction. It is cleared by writing 1 to CAMEF.

fields.name: CB0OF
fields.description: Clear buffer 0 overflow flag Writing 1 clears the buffer 0 overflow flag in the GFXMMU_SR register.

fields.name: CB1OF
fields.description: Clear buffer 1 overflow flag Writing 1 clears the buffer 1 overflow flag in the GFXMMU_SR register.

fields.name: CB2OF
fields.description: Clear buffer 2 overflow flag Writing 1 clears the buffer 2 overflow flag in the GFXMMU_SR register.

fields.name: CB3OF
fields.description: Clear buffer 3 overflow flag Writing 1 clears the buffer 3 overflow flag in the GFXMMU_SR register.

fields.name: CAMEF
fields.description: Clear AHB master error flag Writing 1 clears the AHB master error flag in the GFXMMU_SR register.

fields.name: FF
fields.description: Force flush When set, the cache entries are flushed. This bit is reset by hardware when the flushing is complete. Write 0 has no effect.

fields.name: FI
fields.description: Force invalidate When set, the cache entries are invalidated. This bit is reset by hardware when the invalidation is complete. Write 0 has no effect.

fields.name: DV
fields.description: Default value This field indicates the default 32-bit value which is returned when a master accesses a virtual memory location not physically mapped.

fields.name: PBO
fields.description: Physical buffer offset Offset of the physical buffer.

fields.name: PBBA
fields.description: Physical buffer base address Base address MSB of the physical buffer.

fields.name: PBO
fields.description: Physical buffer offset Offset of the physical buffer.

fields.name: PBBA
fields.description: Physical buffer base address Base address MSB of the physical buffer.

fields.name: PBO
fields.description: Physical buffer offset Offset of the physical buffer.

fields.name: PBBA
fields.description: Physical buffer base address Base address MSB of the physical buffer.

fields.name: PBO
fields.description: Physical buffer offset Offset of the physical buffer.

fields.name: PBBA
fields.description: Physical buffer base address Base address MSB of the physical buffer.
